name: Fortune Feimster
bio: Fortune Feimster is an American comedian, writer, and actor known for warm, story-driven stand-up about her Southern upbringing and coming out. She first gained notice as a writer and panelist on Chelsea Lately, then appeared in The Mindy Project and other series before launching her own Netflix specials. Her specials include Sweet & Salty and Good Fortune.

timeline.ev: Joins Chelsea Lately as writer and panelist
Recurring role on The Mindy Project
First Netflix special, Sweet & Salty, released
Second Netflix special, Good Fortune, released
Third Netflix special, Crushing It, released

accolades: Critics Choice nominations for Sweet & Salty and Good Fortune
Series regular on The Mindy Project and Champions

bits.t: Went To Hooters For Her Birthday
